creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 145456
shar archive with new port

This new port is a prerequisite for next version of 
existing port security/p5-openxpki, needed to enable 
SCEP protocol on server side of the openxpki server.

The proposed version of the port has passed tests 
on FreeBSD-10.0 (amd64) with:

- port test
- poudriere testport ...
